// about me

Building things
that matter

Detail-oriented B.Tech Computer Science graduate with a strong foundation in Python programming and software development principles. Skilled in writing efficient, scalable code with knowledge of data structures, object-oriented programming, and core frameworks.

Hands-on experience building full-stack applications, data analysis pipelines, and machine learning-powered solutions. From Django backends to ML models deployed on Streamlit — I enjoy the full spectrum of development.

Strong problem-solving abilities, communication skills, and a proactive mindset to learn and adapt in fast-paced environments.

Selected Work

Live
CarZone – Online Car Marketplace
HTML5 CSS3 JavaScript Django MySQL

Full-stack car marketplace with responsive UI, advanced search/filter (model, location, year, price range), backend CRUD for car listings, and complete user management system.

ML Model
Health Insurance Premium Prediction
Python Scikit-learn XGBoost Pandas Streamlit

Engineered a normalized medical risk score from disease history. End-to-end EDA, data cleaning, and encoding. Trained Linear, Ridge Regression, and XGBoost; tuned with RandomizedSearchCV.

↗ Live App ⌥ GitHub
🏠
Real Estate Research Tool using RAG
Python LangChain Groq FAISS HuggingFace Streamlit

AI-powered Q&A tool that scrapes content from any URL and answers natural language questions using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with source citation.

Dashboard
IPL Performance Analysis – Power BI
Power BI DAX Data Modeling

Visually rich dashboard with color-coded KPI cards, treemaps, donut charts, and bar charts. Dynamic interactive filtering for player performance and match impact analysis across seasons.

⌥ GitHub
Networking
Campus Network Design – Cisco Packet Tracer
Cisco Packet Tracer VLAN Routing

Designed and simulated a large-scale hierarchical campus network topology with multiple departments, VLANs, routers, switches, and end devices across buildings.
